title: CPVP / SpongebobPack (Crystal PvP)
body:
- **Theme:** SpongeBob Pack

- **Armor:**
  - **Nether Armor:** Patrick Star style
  - **Diamond Armor:** SpongeBob style
- **Tools:**  
  - **Diamond Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, etc.:** All in SpongeBob style for diamond tools, and Patrick Star style for Nether tools
- **Custom Items:**
  - **Golden Apples:** Crab Burger (Custom)
  - **XP Bottles:** Mr. Krabs (Custom)
  - **Ender Pearls:** Jellyfish (Custom)
  - **Crystal:** SpongeBob elements (Custom)
  - **Obsidian:** SpongeBob elements (Custom)
  - **Anchor:** SpongeBob elements  (Custom)
  - **Glowstone:** SpongeBob elements  (Custom)

Everything designed in the fun, vibrant style of SpongeBob and his friends for a unique CrystalPVP experience!
